summary: First test pass for Z-Digital Solutions portfolio. Backend pytest suite (7/7 passed) covering root, health (email_configured=false), contact create/validation/list and no _id leaks. Frontend UI tested end-to-end: nav/hero/pricing/contact sections load, three tiers with ₹15,000/₹30,000/₹40,000+ visible, pricing CTA scrolls to contact and pre-fills the tier (zd:select-tier event working), contact form POST succeeds and Sonner 'Inquiry received' toast appears. No console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is defined AFTER it's referenced in _send_inquiry_email and create_inquiry exception handler. If those error paths trigger during startup/early requests, a NameError could occur. Recommend moving logging.basicConfig + logger = logging.getLogger(__name__) to just below imports.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); consider migrating to lifespan context manager.
Hero heading uses non-breaking space ( ) between 'heavy' and 'lifting' — fine for display, but makes text-based assertions brittle; optional to add a data-testid on the headline for stable selection.
seed_data_creation: A handful of TEST_ prefixed inquiries were created in MongoDB 'inquiries' collection during test runs (via /api/contact). They are harmless but can be cleaned up if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py and can be re-run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest /app/backend/tests/test_api.py -v. All data-testids referenced in the review request are present and working. RESEND_API_KEY is intentionally unset — email_sent is correctly false and backend does not attempt to send.
